summary: Comprehensive testing of refactored route modules completed. All 9 extracted route modules (auth, payments, admin, public_api, loyalty, seller, referral, escrow) are working correctly after major refactoring. 30/30 backend API tests passed. Frontend loads correctly, login works, multi-language feature functional.

issues: Stats cards appear to have slow loading or rendering - cards visible but content may take time to populate

passed_tests: Health endpoint: /api/health returns healthy status
Categories endpoint: /api/categories returns 8 categories
Cities endpoint: /api/cities returns 41 Romanian cities
Auth login: /api/auth/login works with valid credentials
Auth login: Correctly rejects invalid credentials (401)
Auth me: /api/auth/me requires authentication (401)
Auth me: Returns user data when authenticated
Auth logout: /api/auth/logout works correctly
Auth register: Rejects duplicate email (400)
Payments webhook GET: Returns Viva verification key (475FFE73819D67134BBB2D6690A9023714C14E2E)
Payments create-order: Requires authentication (401)
Admin stats: /api/admin/stats returns user/ad counts
Admin users: /api/admin/users returns paginated user list
Admin ads: /api/admin/ads returns paginated ad list
Admin analytics: /api/admin/analytics/dashboard returns full analytics
Admin auth: Admin endpoints require authentication (401)
Public API status: /api/public/v1/status returns API status and version
Public API ads: /api/public/v1/ads returns public ads with pagination
Public API categories: /api/public/v1/categories returns categories
Loyalty status: /api/loyalty/status returns user loyalty data
Loyalty leaderboard: /api/loyalty/leaderboard returns leaderboard
Seller dashboard: /api/seller/dashboard returns seller data
Seller auth: Seller endpoints require authentication (401)
Referral code: /api/referral/code returns user referral code
Referral auth: Referral endpoints require authentication (401)
Escrow transactions: /api/escrow/my-transactions returns user transactions
Escrow auth: Escrow endpoints require authentication (401)
Ads list: /api/ads returns ads with pagination
Ads filter: /api/ads?category=cars filtering works
Banners: /api/banners returns banner list
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly
Frontend: Login flow works - redirects to homepage after login
Frontend: Multi-language selector visible and functional
Frontend: Admin panel accessible after login
critical_code_review_comments: Route module extraction successful - all 9 modules properly initialized with dependencies via init_dependencies() functions
All routes correctly prefixed with /api through router includes
Authentication and authorization working correctly across all modules
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring verified - 9 route modules extracted from monolithic server.py (2327 lines). All modules working: auth.py, payments.py, admin.py, public_api.py, loyalty.py, seller.py, referral.py, escrow.py. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_routes.py with 30 comprehensive tests covering all extracted modules. Viva Wallet webhook key: 475FFE73819D67134BBB2D6690A9023714C14E2E
